节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Provide interfaces related to debugger access and obtaining CPU, memory and other virtual machine information during runtime for JS programs
Get total native heap memory size
注释信息: @returns { bigint } Returns total native heap memory size.
节点.return_description: Returns total native heap memory size.

节点.功能描述: Get Native heap memory allocation size.
注释信息: @returns { bigint } Returns native heap memory allocation size.
节点.return_description: Returns native heap memory allocation size.

节点.功能描述: Get Native heap memory free size
注释信息: @returns { bigint } Returns native heap memory free size.
节点.return_description: Returns native heap memory free size.

节点.功能描述: Get the virtual set size memory of the application process
注释信息: @returns { bigint } Returns application process virtual set size memory information.
节点.return_description: Returns application process virtual set size memory information.

节点.功能描述: Get application process proportional set size memory information
注释信息: @returns { bigint } Returns application process proportional set size memory information.
节点.return_description: Returns application process proportional set size memory information.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the size of the shared dirty memory of a process.
注释信息: @returns { bigint } Returns the size of the shared dirty memory.
节点.return_description: Returns the size of the shared dirty memory.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the size of the private dirty memory of a process.
注释信息: @returns { bigint } Returns the size of the private dirty memory.
节点.return_description: Returns the size of the private dirty memory.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the cpu usage percent of a process.
注释信息: @returns { number } Returns the cpu usage of a process.
节点.return_description: Returns the cpu usage of a process.

节点.功能描述: Start CPU Profiling. The input parameter is a user-defined file name, excluding the file suffix. The generated file is in the files folder under the application directory. Such as "/data/accounts/account_0/appdata/[package name]/files/cpuprofiler-xxx.json"
注释信息: @param { string } filename - Indicates the user-defined file name,  excluding the file suffix.

parameters.说明: Indicates the user-defined file name,  excluding the file suffix.

节点.功能描述: Stop CPU Profiling. It takes effect only when the CPU profiler is turned on

Dump JS Virtual Machine Heap Snapshot. The input parameter is a user-defined file name, excluding the file suffix. The generated file is in the files folder under the application directory. Such as "/data/accounts/account_0/appdata/[package name]/files/xxx.heapsnapshot"
注释信息: @param { string } filename - Indicates the user-defined file name, excluding the file suffix.

parameters.说明: Indicates the user-defined file name, excluding the file suffix.

节点.功能描述: Start CPU Profiling. The input parameter is a user-defined file name, excluding the file suffix. The generated file is in the files folder under the application directory.
注释信息: @param { string } filename - Indicates the user-defined file name,  excluding the file suffix.
@throws {BusinessError} 401 - the parameter check failed, Parameter type error

parameters.说明: Indicates the user-defined file name,  excluding the file suffix.

error_codes.description: the parameter check failed, Parameter type error

节点.功能描述: Stop CPU Profiling. It takes effect only when the CPU profiler is turned on
Dump JS Virtual Machine Heap Snapshot. The input parameter is a user-defined file name, excluding the file suffix. The generated file is in the files folder under the application directory.
注释信息: @param { string } filename - Indicates the user-defined file name, excluding the file suffix.
@throws {BusinessError} 401 - the parameter check failed, Parameter type error

parameters.说明: Indicates the user-defined file name, excluding the file suffix.

error_codes.description: the parameter check failed, Parameter type error

节点.功能描述: Get a debugging dump of a system service by service id. It need dump permission. This API can be called only by system application. 1.the parameter type error 2.the args parameter is not string array
注释信息: @param { number } serviceid - Indicates the id of the service ability.
@param { Array<string> } args - The args list of the system ability dump interface.
@throws {BusinessError} 401 - the parameter check failed, Possible causes:
@throws {BusinessError} 11400101 - ServiceId invalid. The system ability does not exist.

parameters.说明: Indicates the id of the service ability.
The args list of the system ability dump interface.

error_codes.description: the parameter check failed, Possible causes:
ServiceId invalid. The system ability does not exist.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the cpu usage of system.
注释信息: @returns { number } Returns the cpu usage of system.
@throws { BusinessError } 11400104 - The status of the system CPU usage is abnormal.
节点.return_description: Returns the cpu usage of system.

error_codes.description: The status of the system CPU usage is abnormal.

节点.功能描述: Get the CPU usage of all threads in the application.
注释信息: @returns { ThreadCpuUsage[] } Returns the CPU usage of all threads in the application.
节点.return_description: Returns the CPU usage of all threads in the application.

节点.功能描述: Total system memory size, in kilobyte
System free memory size, in kilobyte
System available memory size, in kilobyte

节点.return_description: Returns system memory size.

节点.功能描述: Process proportional set size memory, in kilobyte
Virtual set size memory, in kilobyte
The size of the shared dirty memory, in kilobyte
The size of the private dirty memory, in kilobyte
The size of the shared clean memory, in kilobyte
The size of the private clean memory, in kilobyte
Obtains the memory information of application process.
注释信息: @returns { NativeMemInfo } Returns the native memory of a process.
节点.return_description: Returns the native memory of a process.

节点.功能描述: The limit of the application process's resident set, in kilobyte
The limit of the application process's virtual memory, in kilobyte
The limit of the js vm heap size of current virtual machine, in kilobyte
The limit of the total js vm heap size of process, in kilobyte
Obtains the memory limit of application process.
注释信息: @returns { MemoryLimit } Returns memory limit of application.
节点.return_description: Returns memory limit of application.

节点.功能描述: The memory information of application virtual machine.
Total size of current virtual machine Heap, in kilobyte
Used size of current virtual machine Heap, in kilobyte
All array object size of current virtual machine, in kilobyte
Obtains the memory information of application virtual machine.
注释信息: @returns { VMMemoryInfo } Returns memory information of application virtual machine.
节点.return_description: Returns memory information of application virtual machine.

节点.功能描述: Start capture application trace. 1.The limit parameter is too small 2.The parameter is not within the enumeration type 3.The parameter type error or parameter order error
注释信息: @param { number } limitSize - Max size of trace file, in bytes, the max is 500MB.
@returns { string } Returns absolute path of the trace file.
@throws { BusinessError } 11400103 - No write permission on the file.

parameters.说明: Max size of trace file, in bytes, the max is 500MB.

节点.return_description: Returns absolute path of the trace file.

error_codes.description: No write permission on the file.

注释信息: @throws { BusinessError } 11400104 - The status of the trace is abnormal

error_codes.description: The status of the trace is abnormal

节点.return_description: Returns garbage collection statistics.

节点.功能描述: Get the garbage collection statistics by statistical item. 1. Invalid parameter, a string parameter required. 2. Invalid parameter, unknown property.
节点.return_description: Returns garbage collection statistics.

节点.功能描述: Set the resource limitation of application.Please note that this function is only valid when the developer options switch of setting is turned on. 1.For pss_memory, it means the baseline PSS memory size for the application, system memory control will be triggered if exceed the value too much. 2.For js_heap, it means the percentage of the used JS heap memory to the maximum limit exceed which heap dump will be triggered if enableDebugLog set as true, it can be set between 85 and 95. 3.For fd, it means the maximum fd number can be opened. 4.For thread, it means the maximum thread number can be created. it as true only in gray release because collecting debug log will cost too much cpu or memory. 1.The limit parameter is too small 2.The parameter is not in the specified type 3.The parameter type error or parameter order error
注释信息: @param { string } type - resource type. It could be pss_memory、js_heap、fd、or thread.
@param { number } value - For different resource type, values could have different meaning:
@param { boolean } enableDebugLog - Whether to enable external debug log. Default is false, pls make sure set
@throws { BusinessError } 11400104 - Set limit failed due to remote exception

parameters.说明: resource type. It could be pss_memory、js_heap、fd、or thread.
For different resource type, values could have different meaning:
Whether to enable external debug log. Default is false, pls make sure set

error_codes.description: Set limit failed due to remote exception

节点.功能描述: Judge if the application is in debugged state, including either in arkui layer or native layer debugged state.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } true if the application is debugged.
节点.return_description: true if the application is debugged.

节点.功能描述: Get the graphics memory of application
注释信息: @returns { Promise<number> } Returns the graphics memory of application, in kilobyte.
@throws { BusinessError } 11400104 - Failed to get the application memory due to a remote exception.
节点.return_description: Returns the graphics memory of application, in kilobyte.

error_codes.description: Failed to get the application memory due to a remote exception.

节点.功能描述: Get the graphics memory of application
注释信息: @returns { number } Returns the graphics memory of application, in kilobyte.
@throws { BusinessError } 11400104 - Failed to get the application memory due to a remote exception.
节点.return_description: Returns the graphics memory of application, in kilobyte.

error_codes.description: Failed to get the application memory due to a remote exception.
